zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Carwithy於大約1627年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆時，她的父親David Carwithen39歲，母親Grace Alice Alcock27歲。她於1645年與Richard Curtice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1666年10月5日之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Carwithy于大约1627年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆时，她的父亲David Carwithen39岁，母亲Grace Alice Alcock27岁。她于1645年与Richard Curtice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1666年10月5日之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.description: After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Carwithy was born about 1627, in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, David Carwithen, was 39 and her mother, Grace Alice Alcock, was 27. She married Richard Curtice in 1645, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 5 October 1666, in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Carwithy est née environ 1627, à Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, David Carwithen, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Grace Alice Alcock, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Curtice en 1645, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 5 octobre 1666, à Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Carwithy um 1627 in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Carwithen 39 und ihre Mutter Grace Alice Alcock 27. Sie hat 1645 in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Richard Curtice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 5. Oktober 1666 in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Carwithy è nata il circa 1627 nel Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, David Carwithen, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Grace Alice Alcock, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Richard Curtice nel 1645, nel Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 5 ottobre 1666, nel Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Carwithyが約1627年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーサレムで生まれた時，父David Carwithenは39歳，母Grace Alice Alcockは27歳であった。1645年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムでRichard Curticeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1666年10月5日以後にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクソウソルドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Carwithy(이)가 대략 1627년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Carwithen(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Alice Alcock(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에서 Richard Curtice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1666년 10월 5일 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Carwithy nasceu aproximadamente 1627, em Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, David Carwithen, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Grace Alice Alcock, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Curtice em 1645, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 5 de outubro de 1666, em Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Carwithy родилась около 1627 г. в местности сеилем, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени David Carwithen было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Alice Alcock, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Curtice в 1645 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 5 октябрь 1666 г. в местности соутолд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Carwithy nació aproximadamente 1627, en Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, David Carwithen, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Grace Alice Alcock, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Richard Curtice en 1645, en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 5 de octubre de 1666, en Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America.
